data.content: Implemented the history agent-label fix in worktree branch foolery-b45e. Response identity extraction now only trusts explicit response metadata/provider-model fields and no longer falls back to unrelated nested ids like message.id, so OpenRouter-backed responses preserve their provider/model label while sessions without response metadata keep the session-start agent label. Enabled unit Vitest discovery for .test.tsx files so the SessionCard render regression runs, and added parser coverage for both metadata override and no-metadata fallback. Also resolved existing BeatForm lint/compiler issues by replacing the draft ref/watch callback pattern with lazy draft state plus react-hook-form subscribe/useEffectEvent. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-b45e passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Commit: 8dfb44c27277 pushed to origin/foolery-b45e.
